text: While resolving a conflict at this province, attacking characters cannot have their skills increased by attachment cards.
flavorText:
"It is of little surprise the Crab settle within a misshapen land where water and fire are forever locked in turmoil."
- Otomo Asuikawa
name: Shore of the Ashen Flames

text: Void role only. Corrupted. When this character would leave play, remove it from the game instead. Action: Sacrifice a character - put this character into play (at home) from your discard pile or province.
flavorText: The ire of one betrayed is difficult to quell.
name: Bloodthirsty Onryō

text: Action: If the [element-fire] ring is in your claimed ring pool - search your dynasty deck and faceup cards in your provinces for copies of this card and put them into play. Shuffle. (Max 1 per round.) Reaction: After this character leaves play, if it is in your discard pile - shuffle it into your dynasty deck.
name: Cinder Salamander

text: Interrupt: When you play a Jade card - reduce the cost of that card by 1. Action: Search the top 8 cards of your conflict deck for a Spell, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.
flavorText: "Refinement is born from an impassioned heart and a steady hand." -Yasuki Kiyoko
name: Earnest Sculptor

text: You cannot lose honor to pay costs. Each character that is tainted or Corrupt gets -2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political]. Action: During the conflict phase, if you have equal or fewer cards in your hand than your opponent, choose a character - taint that character.
name: Kuni Juurou

text: This character gets +1 glory for each holding you control (to a maximum of 2).
flavorText: "One must be wary of the mountain Masuiensou-dono. Wary but emboldened; for riches can be discovered within its shadow." -Kaiu Nobuko
name: Protected Merchant

text: Reaction: After you win a [conflict-military] conflict as the attacker, sacrifice a participating Berserker character and choose a participating character controlled by your opponent - return all fate on that character to its owner's fate pool. Then, discard that character. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Broken Blades

text: Play only if you control a Berserker character, or a character with printed [conflict-military] skill 5 or higher. Action: During the conflict phase, if no conflicts have yet been declared this phase - declare your first conflict.
flavorText: "I'd hate for this discussion to get...uncivil."
name: Outmaneuvered by Force

text: Conflict Action: At this province, choose a participating character - honor or dishonor that character.
flavorText: The bamboo never stops speaking of the secrets it hides.
name: Forest of Rustling Whispers

text: During conflicts at this province, while this province is unbroken, cancel all ring effects. Action: Choose a non-stronghold province you control - move this card to that province. Then, discard each other holding in that province.
flavorText: "Remember."
name: Storm from Sakkaku

text: Covert. Interrupt: When the effects of a card ability or ring effect that targets a dishonored [clan-crane] character you control would initiate - cancel those effects.
flavorText: "There are no words to express how much I loathe this forsaken land."
name: Daidōji Ahma

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose a participating character - that character gets -2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. Then, if this character is dishonored and that character’s [conflict-military] skill is 0, remove 1 fate from it or discard it if it has no fate.
flavorText: "General Ota's troops must be here somewhere."
name: Daidōji Ambusher

text: Sincerity. Composure — This character gains “Conflict Action: Draw 1 card. If you count more current [conflict-political] skill in the conflict than your opponent, gain 1 honor.”
flavorText: An unstable environment creates new problems, and new opportunities.
name: Desperate Aide

text: Fire role only. [conflict-military] Conflict Action: If you control a participating character, choose a participating character controlled by an opponent. That opponent selects one - either dishonor it or move it home. You may dishonor a participating character you control to resolve this ability twice. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Nature's Wrath

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Each participating character your opponent controls gets -X[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. X is equal to 1 if you control a participating Bushi character, or 2 if you also control a participating Shinobi or Scout character. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Arrows from the Woods

text: Can only be played during the draw phase. Can be played from your discard pile. Attach to an Artisan, Courtier, or [clan-crane] character you control. Attached character cannot participate in conflicts. Action: During the fate phase, sacrifice this attachment - gain honor equal to the glory of attached character. Remove this card from the game.
name: Developing Masterpiece

text:
Eminent.

Opponents cannot gain or remove fate from rings, unless you lost a conflict this phase or any player has passed on declaring a conflict this phase.
flavorText: Lights beckon from below emerald waters.
name: Cliffs of the Sea Dragon

text: Pride. Cannot be evaded by the covert keyword. Reaction: After this character enters play - search your conflict conflict deck or discard pile for a Title or Technique attachment with printed cost 1 or lower. Put it into play attached to this character. It cannot be chosen as a target of an opponent's card ability while attached to this character. Shuffle.
name: Kitsuki Masanori

text: No attachments except Technique. While the bid on your honor dial is odd, this character gets +2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political]. Otherwise, this character gets -2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political]. Interrupt: When fate would be placed on the [element-water] ring - instead, place that fate on this character.
name: Kitsuki Seiji

text: Each character you control gains +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] for each other copy of them that you control.
flavorText: “We are the sum total of all the things that we are not.”
name: Nameless Brother

text: Interrupt: When the effects of a card ability that targets an attachment on a character you control would initiate, discard this card from your hand - cancel those effects unless the player who initiated that ability discards 2 cards at random from their hand.
flavorText: "One more hour until nightfall!"
name: Village Dōshin

text: Conflict Action: Choose a participating Monk character with no Weapon attachments you control, and choose a participating character with no Weapon attachments controlled by the opponent - bow that opponent's character. If your Monk is Tattooed, that character cannot be readied until the end of the conflict.
name: Palm Strike

text: Monk character you control only. Costs 1 less to play on a character with printed cost 3 or less. Attached character gains Tattooed. Reaction: After attached character is bowed by a card ability (cost or effect) - ready it. If you triggered that ability, dishonor it.
name: Bamboo Tattoo

text: Water role only. Attached character gains Creature, loses Bushi, loses Courtier, and loses all printed abilities.
flavorText: "You shall serve as our ambassador."
name: Seiji's Fate

text: Eminent. Reaction: After you play a character - reduce the cost of the next character or Follower you play this round by 1.
flavorText: This land we claim by the strength of the Lion, and we shall defend it.
name: Fortune's Field

text: Earth role only. Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, if this card is in an unbroken province, sacrifice this card - if it is the first time this round you have triggered a copy of this ability, gain 2 fate and draw 2 cards. Otherwise, gain 2 honor.
name: Planted Fields

text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, choose an opponent's character - until the end of the phase, each time that character commits or moves to a conflict, ready this character and move it to the conflict.
flavorText: Do not underestimate the eyes of their scouts.
name: Ikoma Master Hunter

text: Reaction: During the conflict phase, after this character leaves play, if it is in your discard pile - put it into play (at home). The next time this character would leave play this round, remove it from the game instead.
flavorText: "Challenge me!  I did not come here to play games with you."
name: Relentless Gloryseeker

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Sacrifice 1 or more participating Follower cards. Choose a participating character with printed cost equal to or lower than the number of cards you sacrificed - discard that character.
flavorText: Foolish to challenge the Lion in her den.
name: Corner the Prey

text: Restricted. Attach to a character you control. [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Sacrifice this attachment and choose a character on the enemy side. Their controller must select one - remove 1 fate from that character or move it home. (Max 1 per round.)
name: Kinki

text: Costs 1 less to play on a character with glory 2 or higher. Reaction: After this card enters play, choose a Follower you control that is not a copy of this card - return that Follower to your hand.
name: Promising Hohei

text: Limit 1 Title per character. Courtier or Scout character only. During the fate phase, this attachment gains ancestral. Attached character does not have its skills decreased by status tokens. Attached character gains covert while attacking alone.
name: The Lion's Shadow

text: Eminent. You can only trigger one of this card's abilities per round. Action: Bow a Spirit character you control and choose an unclaimed ring - claim that ring as a [conflict-political] ring. Action: Choose a Spirit character with printed cost 3 or lower in one of your discard piles - put that character into play. The next time it would leave play this round, remove it from the game instead.
name: The Empty City

text: Air role only. This character gets +1 glory for each Spirit character you control. Action: Even during the dynasty phase, choose a non-stronghold province you control - look at the top 3 cards of your dynasty deck. Place 1 of those cards into that province faceup, place another on the bottom of that deck, and discard the other card. Then, if you discarded a Spirit, each player loses 1 honor.
name: Ceremonial Robes

text: Action: Return a [element-fire] ring from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool - resolve the [element-fire] ring's effect.
flavorText: “As the fire strengthens the field by destroying the weeds, so shall we burn down the enemies of peace in this new garden.”
name: Firebrand

text: Keeper role only. Legendary 2. No attachments except Spell or Spirit. Action: During the conflict phase, bow this character. Choose a character with the highest cost (you choose in case of a tie) - move 1 fate from that character to your fate pool.
name: Paranoid Hōsōshi

text: This character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution while defending, if the opponent counts a total of 0 skill during conflict resolution.
flavorText: “Your parties are wasteful. Your friends? Useful.”
name: Vigilant Guardian

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict with more characters on your side than the enemy side - place 1 fate on this character. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: “My only purpose in life is to party and make new friends.”
name: Gregarious Ward

text: No attachments except Spell. While you control a Shugenja at this character's location (at home or in a conflict), this character cannot leave play. Otherwise, discard this character from play.
flavorText: The Phoenix shape the world into that which they desire.
name: Servitor of Stone

text: Limit 1 Title per character. Bushi character only. Reaction: After this attachment enters play - honor attached character. Attached character gains: “Interrupt: When the effects of an opponent's card ability that targets a non-Bushi character you control would initiate, sacrifice this character - cancel those effects. Return this card to your hand.”
name: Shiba's Oath

text: Conflict Action: Select one - your opponent • loses 1 honor, if they have 7 or more honor. • loses 1 fate. • discards 1 card at random.
flavorText: These stones hold secrets.
name: Jade-Colored Rocks

text: Action: Sacrifice this holding - search your conflict deck for a Poison attachment, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.
flavorText: "Do you like my pets?"
name: Underground Ophidiarium

text: Earth role only. Cannot participate in conflicts as an attacker. Cannot be evaded by the covert keyword. Forced Interrupt: When this character leaves play - in turn order, each player may dishonor another character they control to draw a card.
name: Ancient Stone Guardian

text: You may play cards under this character as if they were in your hand. Reaction: After an opponent plays an event, if there are no cards under this character - put that event under this character (faceup).
flavorText: "If you carefully re-read page 93, you will see that I am, in fact, correct."
name: Disloyal Oathkeeper

text: Reaction: After one of your card effects dishonors an opponent's character - take another action.
flavorText: Swift reprisal encourages proper respect for the rules.
name: Zealous Inspector

text: Reaction: After a conflict begins, if you control a Shugenja character - put this character into play from your hand in the conflict. You may move home another character you control. (Max 1 per conflict.) Action: If you control a Shugenja character with a Trait that matches the element of any ring in your claimed ring pool - return this character to your hand.
name: Illusionary Decoy

text: Reaction: After a conflict begins in which you are the attacking player, lose 1 honor - you have the first action opportunity in this conflict. The defending player sets 2 random cards from their hand aside, faceup and out of play. At the end of the conflict, that player adds the set-aside cards to their hand.
name: Sneak Attack

text: If attached character has the Shinobi trait, it gains: “Conflict Action: Choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower - move that character to this conflict.”
flavorText: Sometimes they forget to send you a proper invitation.
name: Kagi-Nawa

text: Conflict Action: At this province, the attacking player chooses a character they control - send it home.
flavorText: The breath from the caverns whisper of mysteries better left forgotten.
name: Obsidian Caves

text: Forced Reaction: After you lose an unopposed conflict - discard this holding. Conflict Action: Choose a participating [clan-unicorn] character you control - honor it. If you lose this conflict, dishonor it at the end of the conflict.
name: Fields of Rolling Thunder

text: During [element-fire] conflicts, set this character's base [conflict-military] to 0. Conflict Action: Even when at home, choose another character on your side - move this character to the conflict. Then, either this character gets +2[conflict-military] and the other character gets -2 glory or this character gets -2[conflict-military] and the other character gets +2 glory for this conflict.
name: Ichigo-kun

text: Action: During a conflict, move this character home or to the conflict. Choose another participating character - that character gets -2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "This deed reeks of the unthinking rage of the Crab. We will not allow it to go unavenged."
name: Shinjo Archer

text: Action: Search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for a non-unique [clan-unicorn] character with glory 1 or higher and play that character at home (paying all costs). Shuffle.
flavorText: She has four daughters, but she exceeds them all.
name: Utaku Takeko

text: Void role only. No attachments. During glory counts, each player adds to their side the highest [conflict-military] skill from characters they control. Reaction: After a character leaves play during a conflict - put this card into play from your hand. Claim the Imperial Favor on the [conflict-military] side.
name: Whispers of the Lords of Death

text: Reaction: After one or more characters controlled by an opponent move home (including as a result of conflict resolution), choose one of those characters - bow it. Until the end of the phase, that character cannot be readied.
flavorText: We look to the west, for signs the Empire still stands.
name: Long Journey Home

text: Reaction: After the resolution of a conflict, if you lost the conflict as the defending player and you control equal or more broken provinces than the attacking player, choose a ready character you control who is honored or Battle Maiden - immediately declare an additional [conflict-military] conflict with that character alone. (Max 1 per round.)
name: Retribution!

text: Conflict Action: Even when at home, name a card - reveal the top 3 cards of your opponent's dynasty deck. You may discard this attachment to play a non-unique character from those cards into the conflict as if it were in your hand, reducing its cost by 3 if it is a copy of the named card.
name: Ashalan Lantern

text: Eminent. Increase your deckbuilding influence by 4. Interrupt: When this province is broken during a conflict - claim the Imperial Favor.
flavorText: They came from all the ships and built themselves a home.
name: Yatakabune Port

text: Conflict Action: Choose an attacking character you control - move that character home. If that character is Mantis Clan, take 1 fate from the defending player.
flavorText: "The Empress ignores us? The Mantis take what we want for ourselves."
name: Mangrove Safehouse

text: No attachments except Spell or Spirit. You may play this character as an attachment with the text: “Immune to events. Attached character gains Corrupt. While attached character is participating in a conflict, their controller cannot add cards to their hand by their card effects unless the [element-void] ring is in their claimed ring pool.”
name: Jealous Ancestor

text: No attachments, unless their printed cost is 1 or higher. Conflict Action: Even when at home, choose an attachment in an opponent's discard pile - play that attachment on this character, reducing its cost by 1. Then, if this character is at home, move it to the conflict, otherwise move it home.
name: Kuro

text: Reaction: After a conflict begins, if this character is attacking unopposed - place 1 fate from the defender's fate pool on this character. Conflict Action: Remove 1 fate from this character - it gets +1[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. (Limit twice per conflict.)
name: Mantis Raider

text: Legendary 0. No attachments except Spell or Spirit. Action: During the conflict phase - you and another player secretly select a number on your honor dials. Then reveal your dials. If both players selected even or both players selected odd, you take 2 fate from the other player. Otherwise, the player who selected even gains 2 honor, and the player who selected odd draws 2 cards.
name: Mischievous Tanuki

text: Immune to Creature card effects. Reaction: After you claim the [element-water] ring, your opponent must select one - • You gain 1 fate. • You draw 1 card. • You gain 1 honor.
name: Otter Fisherman

text: Action: Choose a dishonored or tainted character in your home area - discard each status token from it, and return all fate on it to its owner's fate pool. Then, discard it and gain 1 honor.
name: Forced Retirement

text: [conflict-political] Conflict Action: Move a Creature or Spirit character you control to the conflict - add the printed cost of that character to your skill during this conflict's resolution (to a maximum of 3). (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: "Have you ever seen such a creature presented before the court?"
name: Marvelous Beings

text: Cannot be played during a conflict. Action: If you control a Merchant character - discard the top 3 cards of an opponent's dynasty deck. Then, choose a non-unique character in one of that opponent's discard piles with equal or lower glory than a Merchant you control and play that character as if it were in your hand. (Max 1 per round.)
name: To Connect the People

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose a participating character with lower [conflict-political] skill than a participating Courtier character you control - move that character home and bow it. [conflict-political] Conflict Action: Choose a participating character with lower [conflict-military] skill than a participating Bushi character you control - move that character home and bow it.
name: To Govern the Land

text: Support. Play only if you control a Shugenja or Monk character. Action: Choose a non-Shugenja non-Monk character - until the end of the phase, whenever an opponent chooses that character or an attachment on it as a target of a card ability, they must pay 1 additional fate as an additional cost.
name: To Show the Path

text: Action: Play a Peasant character from one of your discard piles as if it were in your hand. Action: Bow a Peasant character you control and choose an unbroken province - turn that province facedown. (Max 1 per round.)
flavorText: They shall build a new Empire.
name: To Sow the Earth

text: Limit 1 Title per character. Shugenja character only. While you control no Corrupt characters, this attachment gains ancestral. Attached character gains: “Conflict Action: Choose a participating tainted or Corrupt character - bow that character.”
name: Writ of Sanctification

text: Limit 1 Title per character. Play only on an honored character. While attached character is honored, this attachment gains ancestral. Attached character gains: “Conflict Action: Choose a participating dishonored character - bow that character.”
name: Writ of Survey
